positive: A vibrant and stylized minimalist portrait of a majestic bioluminescent owl perched on a crystalline branch. The owl features intricate, glowing feather details in shades of cyan, indigo, and emerald. The background is a deep, cosmic gradient blend of midnight blue and violet, with faint nebulae structures. The composition should be central and highly contrasted, emphasizing the owl's elegant silhouette. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave aesthetics, highly detailed line work, volumetric light scattering, clean solid colors, suitable for large-scale screen printing, vector graphic feel. The owl's eyes glow brightly, creating focal points. Studio quality, symmetrical composition, flat print layers with high depth.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, asymmetrical, messy lines, sketch, photorealistic, bokeh, low contrast, grainy
